title: Hospital Operating Twin V2 True-3D Release Standard
intent: Extend the current non-compensable narrative and presentation standard with spatial, route, camera, GPU, fallback, and claim-safety gates required by a real-time 3D operating diorama.

hardGates.name: Operational parity
hardGates.requirement: Every required operational component exists, is recognizable, is visible from at least one canonical camera, appears in the DOM semantic layer, and connects to a route or operating-state change.

hardGates.name: Spatial topology
hardGates.requirement: One scene unit equals one authored meter; required rooms, corridors, doors, roads, and portals match the topology manifest; every required zone is reachable.

hardGates.name: Canonical world-state parity
hardGates.requirement: Across all 19 states, active lever, pressure zone, queue direction, room status, dashboard, and callout describe the same model state with no unrelated scene change.

hardGates.name: Projection fidelity
hardGates.requirement: The active callout tether terminates at its world anchor with no offscreen or occluded active target.

hardGates.name: Route adherence
hardGates.requirement: Actors remain on their authored road, sidewalk, corridor, or portal route and reach every required endpoint.

hardGates.name: Spatial collision safety
hardGates.requirement: Moving actors do not penetrate walls or fixtures and preserve authored vehicle-pedestrian separation.

hardGates.name: Motion continuity
hardGates.requirement: There are no teleports, unexplained reversals, or deadlocks; spawns and despawns occur only at named portals.

hardGates.name: Authored camera timing
hardGates.requirement: The camera moves exactly once on each reveal, never on materialize or resolve, and lands inside the authored safe rectangle without overlapping tweens.

hardGates.name: Camera comfort and visibility
hardGates.requirement: The guided camera never clips geometry, rolls, or loses the target during movement; the callout appears only after settlement.

hardGates.name: Depth-aware executive composition
hardGates.requirement: One active beacon and proposition dominate; the target remains legible and ambient motion does not cross the active callout or target during the opening three seconds of a beat.

hardGates.name: Asset readiness
hardGates.requirement: All story-critical models, textures, decoders, and shader variants are valid and ready before Run; there is no story-time pop-in.

hardGates.name: Presentation GPU performance
hardGates.requirement: The exact presentation system meets the real-time scene, loading, interaction, and render-budget thresholds in a production build.

hardGates.name: Mobile endurance
hardGates.requirement: A ten-minute physical-device run remains stable without crash, context loss, serious thermal state, or material late-run degradation.

hardGates.name: Render determinism
hardGates.requirement: Canonical logical hashes match across frame rates, autoplay and manual control, reloads, and pause-background-resume; checkpoint actor positions remain within tolerance.

hardGates.name: Failure recovery
hardGates.requirement: Graphics or asset failure restores the same state or enters the accessible 2D fallback within three seconds; offline-after-ready completes the story.

hardGates.name: Parallel semantic scene
hardGates.requirement: Every canonical canvas state has one equivalent DOM summary covering pressure, zone, visible change, metric, and operating implication; the canvas creates no keyboard trap.

hardGates.name: Illustrative-twin claim safety
hardGates.requirement: The experience identifies itself as illustrative, distinguishes visual tokens from literal census, ties every metric to its evidence basis, and makes no unsupported clinical, staffing, safety, or autonomy claim.

hardGates.name: Exact-stage rehearsal
hardGates.requirement: The exact presentation system completes consecutive live runs, cold starts, offline operation, and practiced recovery without narrative, visual, control, or asset failure.
